name: Strategic Energy Resources Limited
summary: Strategic Energy Resources Limited explores for and develops mineral properties in Australia. The company explores copper, gold, and mineral sands. It holds 100% interests in Billa Kalina copper-gold project, and Myall Creek copper project located in South Australia; East Tennant copper-gold project located in Northern Territory; and Saxby gold project located in Queensland, as well as Ambergate heavy mineral sands project located in Western Australia. Strategic Energy Resources Limited was incorporated in 1991 and is based in South Melbourne, Australia.
